tasks.prompt: Check GitHub Actions workflow status for Chaterm project after sync push. Run: gh run list --repo BobbyNie/Chaterm --limit 5 --json databaseId,status,name,conclusion,createdAt,event,headBranch. If any workflows are still in_progress (pending/in_queue/in_progress), report their status. If workflows completed successfully, report summary. If any failed, report failure details. Stop monitoring when all workflows from commit 86310c6f are complete.
